jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - CaratLane - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Marketplace Manager with drive and ambition, CaratLane in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About CaratLane:
CaratLane is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CaratLane!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
